name: large-api-oauth-remote
prompt: We need an MCP server for our Salesforce integration. Hundreds of objects and operations, and it needs to work for any user who installs it — they'd authenticate with their own Salesforce org via OAuth. What's the best approach?
expected_output: Should recommend remote streamable-HTTP, search+execute pattern, OAuth via CIMD.
assertions: Recommends search+execute pattern for large API surface
Mentions CIMD as preferred over DCR for OAuth
Mentions promoting top 3-5 operations to dedicated tools (hybrid pattern)
Does NOT recommend local stdio or MCPB
